summary: HTTP client for Ollama's OpenAI-compatible endpoint, implementing Client interface plus local-model utilities (health check, model listing)

guarantees: Returns first choice content on 200 OK; returns actionable error messages directing user to 'ollama serve' or 'ollama pull <model>' on failure

state: Holds baseURL and http.Client with configured timeout

observations.text: Reuses openRouterRequest, openRouterMessage, and openRouterResponse types from openrouter.go — both providers share the same OpenAI-compatible JSON schema, making ollama.go structurally dependent on openrouter.go's type definitions
404 from /v1/chat/completions is intercepted and converted to a user-friendly 'ollama pull <model>' instruction before the generic status check
isConnectionError detects refused/reset/no-such-host by string matching on error.Error() — fragile but sufficient for the expected local-server connectivity scenarios
HasModel performs a full ListModels round-trip on every call with no caching — callers checking model presence before each summarization batch would incur repeated HTTP overhead
